title: Halliburton stock up 1.8% premarket after Q3 earnings beat
text: Halliburton Co. stock HAL, +2.07% rose 1.8% in premarket trade Tuesday, after the energy services company posted better-than-expected earnings for the third quarter. Halliburton had net income of $544 million, or 60 cents a share, for the quarter, up from $236 million, or 26 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.
